title: Drought prospects for spring 2026
body: "This report sets out the possible impacts next spring of a dry autumn and winter for sectors including:    government and Environment Agency  public water supply  agriculture and horticulture  environment  navigation  other sectors such as energy, leisure and forestry    It explores the actions to be taken to prepare for the possibility of a dry winter and to reduce the risk of drought impacts next year where possible. This report covers England only. "
